response.justification: Candidate has roughly 14-16 years of solid full-stack software engineering experience but lacks the AI/ML depth, cloud platform expertise, and director-level strategic leadership the role demands; AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling work without evidence of building recognized AI products or platforms.
strengths: Long tenure across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure work
Open-source founder experience with GISCollective platform
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products
No advanced degree or evident director-level IC leadership
Limited cloud platform strategy and large-scale architecture experience
